channel.title: Nestia Blog
channel.description: Engineering notes, releases, and practical backend workflow articles from Nestia.

item.title: Do you have Swagger? AI can build your entire frontend. Swagger is the best context and harness
item.description: Well-designed backend types plus a Nestia-generated SDK give AI enough context, constraints, and simulation hooks to build frontend code reliably.

item.title: New NestJS Swagger Generator evolved than ever
item.description: Nestia’s upgraded Swagger generator produces cleaner OpenAPI documents directly from rich TypeScript and NestJS metadata.

item.title: TypeScript Swagger Editor - alternative of MSW and Swagger-UI
item.description: Nestia Editor combines Swagger UI, generated SDKs, and a cloud TypeScript playground for testing OpenAPI APIs with real typed code.

item.title: Stop using Swagger-UI and MSW, but SDK instead
item.description: For frontend teams, a generated SDK and simulator can replace brittle Swagger UI and MSW workflows with type-safe API integration.

item.title: [Nestia] I made backend simulator for frontend developers (similar with MSW, but fully automated)
item.description: Nestia generates a backend simulator for frontend developers, so typed API flows can be built and tested before the real server is ready.

item.title: [Nestia] Make NestJS 30x faster with fastify
item.description: Using Nestia with Fastify can push NestJS throughput dramatically higher by combining faster validation and serialization with a faster HTTP server.

item.title: I made automatic e2e test functions generator for NestJS
item.description: Nestia can generate end-to-end test functions from your NestJS controllers, turning API types into reusable, type-safe test scaffolding.

item.title: Boost up NestJS server much faster and easier (maximum 20,000x faster + tRPC similar)
item.description: Nestia replaces decorator-heavy NestJS boilerplate with pure TypeScript types, fast validation, fast serialization, and generated SDKs.
